title: RegeneraEventEnvelope
description: Canonical envelope for domain and integration events published by Regenera Bank.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event occurrence.

eventType.description: Stable event name in SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE (e.g. PIX_PAYMENT_SETTLED).

eventVersion.description: Schema version for the given eventType.

occurredAt.description: UTC timestamp when the business fact occurred.

correlationId.description: End-to-end trace identifier across HTTP and async flows.

causationId.description: Identifier of the command or event that directly caused this event.

aggregateId.description: Identifier of the domain aggregate (account, payment, transfer, etc.).

tenantId.description: Tenant or institution scope for multi-tenant isolation.

payload.description: Event-specific body; validated by a separate payload schema per eventType/eventVersion.
